---
title: "Resources"
subtitle: "Software, books, websites, datasources, etc. (arbitrarily categorised)."
toc: true
---

## Useful software

**Network analysis**
[Graph-tool](https://graph-tool.skewed.de/) ·
[NetworkX](http://networkx.github.io/) ·
[igraph](http://igraph.org) ·
[SNAP Stanford Network Analysis Project](https://snap.stanford.edu/index.html) ·
[OSMnx Street networks](https://github.com/gboeing/osmnx) ·
[Hive Plots](http://www.hiveplot.com/) ·
[NetBunch](https://github.com/KatolaZ/NetBunch)

**Network analysis - no coding**
[Cytoscape](https://cytoscape.org/) ·
[Gephi](https://gephi.org/)

**Large networks analysis**
[Large Network Visualization Tool](http://lanet-vi.soic.indiana.edu/) ·
[Multinet Large multi-layered graphs](https://multinets.io/) ·
[Cosmograph Visual analytics for big graphs](https://cosmograph.app/)

**Other**
[Power-law Distributions](https://github.com/jeffalstott/powerlaw) ·
[GNU Parallel, Shell tool for jobs in parallel](https://www.gnu.org/software/parallel/)

**Tutorials**
[Network analysis with R and igraph: NetSci Tutorial](http://kateto.net/networks-r-igraph) ·
[Static and dynamic network visualization with R](http://kateto.net/network-visualization) ·
[Temporal networks with R and igraph](http://estebanmoro.org/post/2015-12-21-temporal-networks-with-r-and-igraph-updated/) ·
[Network Analysis Made Simple](https://ericmjl.github.io/Network-Analysis-Made-Simple/)


## Visualising and representing Data

**Plotting**
[Matplotlib Parts of a Figure](https://matplotlib.org/faq/usage_faq.html) ·
[Python_Matplotlib_Cheat_Sheet](https://s3.amazonaws.com/assets.datacamp.com/blog_assets/Python_Matplotlib_Cheat_Sheet.pdf) ·
[Colormaps in Matplotlib](https://matplotlib.org/stable/tutorials/colors/colormaps.html) ·
[List of named colors Matplotlib](https://matplotlib.org/stable/gallery/color/named_colors.html) ·
[Choosing color palettes seaborn](https://seaborn.pydata.org/tutorial/color_palettes.html) ·
[ColorBrewer Color Advice for Maps](http://colorbrewer2.org/) ·
[Create a palette Coolors](https://coolors.co/ef767a-456990-49beaa-49dcb1-eeb868) ·
[What to consider when choosing colors](https://blog.datawrapper.de/colors/)

**Data Art**
[Kirell Benzi](https://www.kirellbenzi.com/) ·
[Information is Beautiful Awards](https://www.informationisbeautifulawards.com/) ·
[Data design and storytelling Tiziana Alocci](https://www.tizianaalocci.com/)

**Data viz**
[Chartable](https://blog.datawrapper.de/) ·
[Find the graphic you need](https://www.data-to-viz.com/index.html) ·
[Free Logo Maker](https://logomakr.com/) ·
[scientific-visualization-book](https://github.com/rougier/scientific-visualization-book) ·
[Redundant coding, text annotations](https://wilkelab.org/SDS375/slides/redundant-coding.html#1) ·
[Streamline Icon Library](https://streamlineicons.com/) ·
[That ole Illustrator magic](https://petterhol.me/2022/04/12/that-ole-illustrator-magic/) ·
[The Python Graph Gallery](https://python-graph-gallery.com/)

## Datasources

**Network**
[Index of Complex Networks](https://icon.colorado.edu/#!/networks) ·
[Netzschleuder the network catalogue](https://networks.skewed.de/) ·
[Network Data Repository](http://networkrepository.com/) ·
[KONECT The Koblenz Network Collection](http://konect.uni-koblenz.de/) ·
[Stanford Large Network Dataset Collection](https://snap.stanford.edu/data/)

**General**
[BlackDemographics US](https://blackdemographics.com) ·
[Colouring London](https://colouringlondon.org/) ·
[data.europa.eu](https://data.europa.eu/en) ·
[Datasets UBDC Data Portal](http://ubdc.gla.ac.uk/dataset) ·
[GoodCityLife](https://goodcitylife.org/) ·
[SoBigData.eu](http://sobigdata.eu/index) ·
[Metroverse Harvard Growth Lab](https://metroverse.cid.harvard.edu/) ·
[Office for National Statistics](https://www.ons.gov.uk/) ·
[OpenAlex The open catalog to the global research system](https://openalex.org/) ·
[QuantUrb](http://www.quanturb.com/) ·
[DataShine Census](https://datashine.org.uk) ·
[Our World in Data](https://ourworldindata.org/) ·
[Humanitarian Data Exchange](https://data.humdata.org/)

**Maps**
[Overpass turbo](https://overpass-turbo.eu/) ·
[TIGER/Line Shapefiles](https://www.census.gov/cgi-bin/geo/shapefiles/index.php) ·
[IPUMS NHGIS · National Historical Geographic Information System](https://www.nhgis.org/) ·
[Mapzen](https://mapzen.com/products/#data)

**Transit**
[TransitFeeds](https://transitfeeds.com/) ·
[Transitland](https://transit.land/)


## Free reading material

**Network Science**
[Glossary of graph theory terms](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Glossary_of_graph_theory_terms) ·
[Network Science book by A. Barabasi](http://networksciencebook.com/) ·
[The Atlas for the Aspiring Network Scientist](https://www.networkatlas.eu/)

**Complexity**
[Complexity Explorer](https://www.complexityexplorer.org) ·
[Think Complexity 2e](https://greenteapress.com/wp/think-complexity-2e) ·
[Complexity Explained](https://complexityexplained.github.io/) ·
[Complexity Digest](http://comdig.unam.mx/) ·
[Complexity Explorables](https://www.complexity-explorables.org/)

**Maths**
[3blue1brown](https://www.3blue1brown.com/) ·
[Encyclopedia of Mathematics](https://www.encyclopediaofmath.org/index.php/Main_Page) ·
[Guide To The Fourier Transform](https://betterexplained.com/articles/an-interactive-guide-to-the-fourier-transform/) ·
[List of mathematical symbols](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_mathematical_symbols) ·
[Random: Probability, Mathematical Statistics, Stochastic Processes](http://www.randomservices.org/random/) ·
[Wolfram Alpha](http://www.wolframalpha.com/) ·
[Symbolab math solver](https://www.symbolab.com/solver/equation-calculator)


## Other collections

[Resources Amaral Lab](https://amaral.northwestern.edu/resources/)

**Awesome lists**
[awesome-network-analysis](https://github.com/briatte/awesome-network-analysis) ·
[awesome-understanding-math](https://github.com/nbro/understanding-math) ·
[awesome-math](https://github.com/sandrofsousa/awesome-math) ·
[awesome-dataviz](https://github.com/sandrofsousa/awesome-dataviz) ·
[awesome-datascience](https://github.com/academic/awesome-datascience) ·
[awesome-computational-social-science](https://github.com/gesiscss/awesome-computational-social-science) ·
[awesome-python](https://github.com/sandrofsousa/awesome-python) ·
[awesome-causality](https://github.com/napsternxg/awesome-causality) ·
[awesome-nlp](https://github.com/keon/awesome-nlp) ·
[speech-language-processing](https://github.com/edobashira/speech-language-processing) ·
[awesome-open-science](https://github.com/silky/awesome-open-science) ·
[awesome-quarto](https://github.com/mcanouil/awesome-quarto)
